reviews.comment:
El taller del ACA PALERMO, es una verdadera inutilidad de supuestos mecánicos automotores, me tuvieron el auto 16 dias solo para cambiarme el aceite, cubiertas, y purgar radiador. De todo esto hicieron todo mal. Me colocaron un aceite que no era acorde al de mi auto, me pusieron arena en el radiador, en el tema cubiertas no lo alinearon ni balancearon, andando en ruta me vibraba toda la direccion y tren delantero. Reclame y un tal Omar  que supuestamente se decia "jefe de taller" y un tal Ezequiel dijieron que se iban a ocupar de la reparacion de los daños causados. Cuando me llamaron para finalmente retirar el auto, el mismo seguia levantando temperatura, no le pusieron el aceite correspondiente y lo peor es que nunca reconocieron las cagadas que se mandaron en el auto. Son un plantel de inutiles e incapaces cumpliendo algo que nunca van a poder ser. Mecanicos automotores. Estafadores.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA Palermo workshop is a complete disgrace, run by so-called automotive mechanics. They kept my car for 16 days just to change the oil, tires, and bleed the radiator. They did everything wrong. They put in the wrong oil for my car, they put sand in the radiator, and they didn't align or balance the tires. When driving on the highway, the entire steering and front suspension vibrated. I complained, and a guy named Omar, who claimed to be the "workshop manager," and another guy named Ezequiel said they would take care of the repairs. When they finally called me to pick up the car, it was still overheating, they hadn't put in the correct oil, and worst of all, they never acknowledged the mess they made. They're a bunch of incompetent and useless people trying to do something they'll never be good at. Automotive mechanics. Swindlers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NDZTUVdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muchos surtidores. Muy buena atención. Exelentes baños. Exelente instrumental para cargar aire y no te lo cobran. Muy buen espacio para maniobrar. Descuentos para socios.

(Translated by Google)
Plenty of pumps. Very good service. Excellent restrooms. Excellent equipment for filling up with air, and they don't charge for it. Plenty of room to maneuver. Discounts for members.
